title: Prepare v0.5.28 immutable release evidence unit
outOfScope: Changing runtime behavior or adopter configuration

sources.reason: Canonical public release tag and supply-chain claims.
Default installer ref must match the pending release tag.
Defines candidate SBOM, provenance, and digest generation.
Defines release-preparation validation against the next public patch tag.
Requires PR-first release preparation followed by exact-SHA workflow dispatch.

riskAssessment.reason: The candidate release must be internally consistent while the public v0.5.28 tag is intentionally created only after this PR merges.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly required release last; v0.5.28 is the next patch after public v0.5.27.

preReviewWarnings: Do not claim v0.5.28 is public until the post-merge release workflow creates the exact-SHA tag and GitHub Release.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record release preparation checkpoints before changing and finishing evidence.

acceptance: release.json declares v0.5.28 and retains the existing public contract and supply-chain claims.
install.sh default ref and usage text resolve v0.5.28.
Committed SBOM, provenance, and release-digests candidate baselines are regenerated for the pending v0.5.28 source commit and pass local consistency checks.
Release-preparation distribution validation accepts v0.5.28 as the next patch while making no public-tag claim; exact-SHA release dispatch remains the final publication step.
guidelines: Do not rewrite or move historical release evidence.
Keep release metadata, generated evidence, and the immutable tag internally consistent.
Treat the release tag as public only after the release workflow succeeds.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: release metadata and installer default agree on v0.5.28
candidate evidence digests are internally consistent
public v0.5.27 remains historical while v0.5.28 is pending
post-merge exact-SHA workflow is the only publication path

intent.problem: Mainline contains the completed remediation set and needs a new immutable release preparation unit without rewriting v0.5.27 or claiming a tag before publication.
constraints: Use the next patch tag v0.5.28.
Keep candidate evidence source-bound and locally verifiable.
Publish only after PR merge through the exact-SHA release workflow.
intent.rationale: A release-preparation PR makes metadata and candidate evidence reviewable, then the post-merge workflow creates the immutable public evidence unit from the verified main SHA.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly confirmed the remediation loop and required release publication last.

rollbackNote: Revert this release-preparation PR; do not rewrite the historical v0.5.27 tag.
